responses: Hello! Welcome to Customer Support. How can I help you today?
Hi there! How can I assist you?
Hey! What can I do for you today?
Goodbye! Have a great day!
See you later! Feel free to come back anytime.
Bye! Take care!
Happy to help! Is there anything else I can assist you with?
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
Glad I could help!

patterns: I want to track my package
What is the status of my order?
When will I get my package?
responses: To track your order, please provide your Order ID and I'll look it up for you.
You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email. Can you share your Order ID?
I can help you check your order status! Please provide your Order ID or registered email.

patterns: How do I get a refund?
I need to return an item
I want to return my order
responses: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. To initiate a refund, please provide your Order ID.
I can help you with a refund! Our policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase. Please share your Order ID.
To process your refund, I'll need your Order ID and reason for return. Could you provide that?
I'm sorry to hear about the billing issue. Please share your account email and I'll investigate the charge.
For billing disputes, please provide your account details and the transaction date so I can assist you.
I can help resolve billing issues. Could you provide your Order ID and describe the issue?
I'm sorry you're experiencing technical issues. Can you describe the error message or problem in detail?
Let's troubleshoot this! What device and browser are you using? And what exactly is happening?
For technical support, please describe the issue step by step so I can assist you better.
We offer a wide range of products! Could you specify which product you're interested in?
I'd be happy to provide product information. Which product are you asking about?
For detailed product info, please visit our catalog page or tell me the specific product you need.
We offer Standard (5-7 days), Express (2-3 days), and Same Day delivery options. Shipping is free on orders above $50!
Delivery times vary: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days, Express takes 2-3 days.
We ship worldwide! International orders typically take 10-15 business days. Would you like more details?
I can help you cancel your order. Orders can be cancelled within 24 hours of placement. Please share your Order ID.
To cancel your order, please provide your Order ID and I'll process the cancellation immediately.
Cancellations are possible before the order is shipped. Please share your Order ID to proceed.

patterns: I want to make a complaint
I want to speak to a manager
responses: I sincerely apologize for your experience. Your feedback is important to us. Could you describe the issue so we can resolve it?
I'm very sorry to hear that. Let me escalate this to our team right away. Please share the details of your complaint.
I understand your frustration and I'm sorry. I'll do everything I can to make this right for you.
I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you rephrase your question?
I'm not sure I understand. Could you provide more details?
That's outside my current knowledge. Please contact our support team at support@company.com for further help.
